blocks.text: I'm `qwen3-coder:480b-cloud`, an AI coding assistant developed by Tongyi Lab. I'm designed to help with software engineering tasks, particularly focusing on Rust development here in the `claw-code` repository. How can I assist you today?

text:
cd ~/gh/claw-code
git add rust/crates/runtime/src/prompt.rs \
        rust/crates/runtime/src/lib.rs \
        rust/crates/rusty-claude-cli/src/main.rs
git commit -m "feat: inject model identity into system prompt to prevent false Claude/Anthropic self-identification"
git push fork main --force
